history.content:
<thought>
The goal O is visible in my local view, and I am currently facing upward. The cell directly in front of me appears to be lava L, so moving forward would be unsafe. To make progress toward the goal while avoiding lava, I will rotate clockwise to face a safe open cell.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward and the cell ahead is a wall, so I cannot go forward. The goal O is visible up-left from my position, and the left side appears open. I will turn counter-clockwise to reorient toward the goal without hitting the wall.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing upward. The cell in front is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The open cell to my right is safe, so I will turn clockwise to face it and continue navigating around the hazard toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO

GIRA_HORARIO

<thought>
